ogTitle: North Stradbroke Island vs North Tivoli: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Stradbroke Island and North Tivoli.
heading: North Stradbroke Island vs North Tivoli — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Stradbroke Island, Queensland and North Tivoli, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Tivoli has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to North Stradbroke Island (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Stradbroke Island or North Tivoli safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Stradbroke Island has a flood risk score of 41/100, while North Tivoli scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Stradbroke Island scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. North Tivoli scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Stradbroke Island or North Tivoli?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Tivoli has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
